HTML templates for JavaScript examples using navigation, Fetch API, jQuery, and XMLHttpRequest.


## Files
- **[base.html](base.html.md)**: HTML template for a JavaScript example with navigation and a simple calculation form.
- **[fetch.html](fetch.html.md)**: HTML template demonstrating the use of the Fetch API for making POST requests in JavaScript.
- **[jquery.html](jquery.html.md)**: HTML template using jQuery for AJAX form submission and result display.
- **[xhr.html](xhr.html.md)**: HTML template demonstrating XMLHttpRequest usage for form submission and result display.
